title: EDIF backend issues with Xilinx Zynq target

features.name: vector port with range exported to EDIF with incorrect array size
features.description: Code should include a module port declaration with a vector range (e.g., [1:0]) that triggers incorrect array size (0) during EDIF export
features.snippet: module top(output [1:0] DMA0DATYPE); wire [1:0] data; assign DMA0DATYPE = data; endmodule

features.name: 1-bit vector port incorrectly treated as array in EDIF
features.description: Code should include a module with ports declared as 1-bit wide vectors (e.g., [0:0]) which get incorrectly represented as arrays in EDIF output instead of scalar wires
